title: TxFullbright
description: (lifestealsmp.com) Disables all lighting, which improves FPS & makes the game use fullbright 24/7. You can also toggle fullbright on/off with a keybind (scroll down in controls).
body:
Very simple mod that disables all lighting, which improves FPS & makes the game use fullbright 24/7. 

You can toggle fullbright on/off with a configurable keybind (defaults to B).

![Fullbright off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2dbd6d08baf6a7e2bd2dca5223bc05ece773957_0.webp)

![Fullbright on (default)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22b07a8f267f94bb42dd6b8adefcee6eb69703c1.webp)

Support server: discord.gg/lifestealsmp
